title: Cloud demand remains elevated
summary: Large cloud customers continued expanding AI server orders, backlog stayed healthy, and supplier commentary suggested solid near-term demand.

title: European ad practices face scrutiny
summary: European regulators increased scrutiny of ad-targeting practices, raising the risk of compliance costs and a slower monetization ramp.

title: Services growth offsets hardware softness
summary: Services revenue improved, free cash flow stayed strong, and management kept a stable outlook despite mixed hardware demand.

title: AWS reacceleration supports margin outlook
summary: AWS growth reaccelerated, capex remained elevated for AI infrastructure, and management implied operating leverage could improve.

title: Credit costs remain contained
summary: Consumer credit metrics stayed manageable and management commentary pointed to resilient balance-sheet quality.

title: Refining margins soften
summary: Refining margins weakened and downstream profitability looked softer than the prior quarter.

title: Search monetization stable but antitrust risk persists
summary: Core advertising trends remained stable, but ongoing antitrust actions could constrain distribution economics.

title: Enterprise AI demand supports backlog
summary: Enterprise demand for AI workloads supported backlog growth and management pointed to durable cloud spending.

title: Traffic and renewal trends stay healthy
summary: Membership renewal trends held up well and customer traffic stayed firm, supporting defensive earnings quality.

title: Custom silicon momentum improves
summary: Custom silicon demand improved, networking remained firm, and management described a constructive product cycle.
